name: Dhanwantharam Thailam
tagline: Classical joint & muscle oil for Vata imbalance
benefits: Deeply nourishing medicated oil that pacifies Vata, relieves joint and muscle pain, improves flexibility, and supports post-exercise recovery.
usage: Warm the oil slightly. Massage into affected joints or full body in circular motions for 20 minutes before bath.

name: Brahmi Amla Hair Oil
tagline: Cooling scalp oil for stress-related hair fall
benefits: Cools the scalp, reduces Pitta-driven hair fall, nourishes hair roots, improves sleep quality, and calms an overactive mind.
usage: Apply to scalp and hair roots. Leave for at least 1 hour or overnight. Wash with a mild shampoo. Use 2–3 times a week.

name: Ashwagandha Root Capsules
tagline: Adaptogenic support for stress, sleep & stamina
benefits: Clinically studied adaptogen that reduces cortisol, improves sleep quality, boosts stamina, and supports thyroid function. Best for chronic stress and exhaustion.
usage: 1 capsule twice daily with warm milk or water, preferably after meals. Take consistently for 8–12 weeks for best results.

name: Triphala Churna
benefits: The quintessential Ayurvedic tridoshic formula. Gently cleanses the digestive tract, regulates bowel movements, and supports liver and eye health.
usage: 1/2 teaspoon with warm water at bedtime. Can also be taken in the morning on an empty stomach. Start with a smaller dose.

name: Kumkumadi Brightening Face Oil
tagline: Saffron-based elixir for luminous, even-toned skin
benefits: Luxury Ayurvedic face oil with saffron and 16 rare herbs. Brightens complexion, fades dark spots, deeply moisturises, and gives a natural glow.
usage: Apply 3–4 drops on clean face. Gently press into skin using fingertips. Use at night for best absorption. Do not wash off.

name: Chyawanprash Immunity Jam
tagline: Traditional 40-herb immunity tonic for all ages
benefits: India's oldest immunity formula. Strengthens respiratory tract, builds Ojas (vital essence), improves strength and stamina, and supports healthy ageing.
usage: 1 teaspoon with warm milk, morning and evening. Children: 1/2 teaspoon. Best taken consistently through seasonal changes.

name: Shatavari Women's Wellness Capsules
tagline: Hormonal balance & reproductive health for women
benefits: The premier Ayurvedic herb for women. Balances oestrogen levels, eases menstrual discomfort, supports fertility, and helps with menopausal transitions.
usage: 1 capsule twice daily with warm milk. Take for minimum 3 months for hormonal benefits. Safe for long-term use.

name: Neem & Turmeric Cleansing Bar
tagline: Antibacterial handcrafted soap for acne-prone skin
benefits: Cold-pressed Ayurvedic cleansing bar that fights acne-causing bacteria, reduces inflammation, controls excess oil, and leaves skin clear and fresh.
usage: Use as a regular soap for face and body. Lather well and rinse. For acne: leave lather on for 60 seconds before rinsing.
